lines: CREATE TABLE t_pr_split_header (a UInt64, b UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY a;

@@ -14,6 +14,7 @@ INSERT INTO t_pr_union_1 SELECT number FROM numbers(1000);
INSERT INTO t_pr_union_2 SELECT number + 1000 FROM numbers(1000);
CREATE VIEW v_pr_union AS SELECT a FROM t_pr_union_1 UNION ALL SELECT a FROM t_pr_union_2;
CREATE TABLE t_pr_const (a UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY a;
INSERT INTO t_pr_const SELECT number FROM numbers(100000);
@@ -16,6 +16,7 @@ INSERT INTO t_pr_union_local_1 SELECT number FROM numbers(5);
INSERT INTO t_pr_union_local_2 SELECT number + 5 FROM numbers(5);
